name.en: Austria — Alpine and Danube corridor notes

description.en: Alpine and Danube-side constraints for cargo that transits Austria after leaving the UK: winter weight checks, tunnel escorts and Vienna–Graz–Linz trunk patterns.

keyword.en: Austria Alpine transit UK Turkey, Brenner tunnel winter rules Hanbros UK

text.en:
Austrian segments often decide whether a convoy needs snow chains, second drivers or daylight-only moves. Height and weight envelopes differ from lowland EU routes—send technical sheets before we price the leg.

Danube barge options exist for certain bulk or project shapes; they trade speed for fuel efficiency and can suit non-urgent UK-exported industrial kits.
